title: RIP Claude Fable, open-source AI unleashed, full body avatars, new Google models, new TTS: AI NEWS
summary: AI Search presents a comprehensive news segment covering recent AI models and tools including GLM 5.2, Kimi K2.7, Claude Fable, MiniMax M3, and various research projects in video generation, avatars, and speech synthesis. The video reviews multiple emerging AI capabilities across language models, multimodal systems, and creative generation tools.
writeup: This AI Search news roundup surveys a batch of recent model and tool releases, including the language models GLM 5.2, Kimi K2.7, Claude Fable, and MiniMax M3, alongside research in video generation, 3D avatars, and speech synthesis. It matters as a single pass over a fast-moving release cycle spanning language models, multimodal systems, and creative generation tools. Coverage extends to vision-language models, text-to-speech, attention mechanisms, full body avatars, and new Google models.
